{{Expand}}

{{Infobox character
| name = Abyssal Palace Herald
| introduced = cradle-08-wintersteel
}}

== Wintersteel ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|The [[Abyssal Palace Herald]] hurls chunks of mountains at [[Fury]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c27">''Wintersteel'', chapter 27</ref>}}

== Reaper ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|The [[Herald]] of [[Abyssal Palace]] arrived after the Blood, Silent, and Storm [[Sages]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c24">''Reaper'', chapter 24</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Wintersteel]]
[[Category:Reaper]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle characters]]
